On.Send: AnimBracketStart Spell Spell Spell Stand ContentForceLooping 0.500000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart Attack Attack {} Stand OpeningPlayForever 1.800000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death 0 2.000000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart Attack Stand,Work,Superior,Start Stand,Work,Superior Stand,Work,Superior,End FullMatch 1.400000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth {} Death ContentPlayOnce 2.000000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce 1.200000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce 1.200000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce 2.000000 AsDuration
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce 2.000000 AsDuration
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce 6.250000 AsDuration

Remove.Terms: AbilMorph.*.Start; ValidatePlayer HHWidowMineAttackRangeUpgraded; MorphTo HHWidowMine; Selected

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Attack Attack {} Stand OpeningPlayForever 1.800000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart Attack Attack {} Stand OpeningPlayForever 1.800000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death 0 10.000000 AsDuration
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death 0 10.000000 AsDuration
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death 0 10.000000 AsDuration
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death 0 10.000000 AsDuration
AnimBracketStart BSD Stand,Work,Start Stand,Work Death 0 0.500000 AsDuration
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever

On.Terms: AbilMorph.*.Finish; MorphTo HotSTorrasque; MorphFrom TorrasqueChrysalis; !ValidatePlayer CommanderPrestigeKerriganBrood
AbilMorph.*.Finish; MorphTo HotSTorrasque; MorphFrom TorrasqueChrysalis; ValidatePlayer CommanderPrestigeKerriganBrood

On.Send: AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce 0.800000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart DeepBurrow Burrow,Superior,A IGNORE Unburrow,Superior,A ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart DeepBurrow Burrow,Superior,B IGNORE IGNORE ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce

On.Terms: AbilMorph.*.Start; MorphFrom Stargate; MorphTo StargateWarp; ValidateUnit HaveProdigalEngineer

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death Instant
